text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One fine day, Symboli Rudolf, Tokai Teio, and
Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi are called upon to do a
magazine interview.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm... If I recall correctly, we'll be doing the
interviews after the photo shoot, right?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
That's right! The theme of this special feature is
"The Umamusume We Look Up To." Why don't we
start with you, Symboli Rudolf?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: You always make an impression in your races, and the last was no different! It makes me wonder: in whose footsteps are you trying to follow?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your kind words. I always set out to
be a lodestar on which others can set their sights.
As such, I worked hard to achieve the results I did
in that race.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I shall continue striving, body and soul, to be a paragon for others. Put simply, I look up to myself as someone who must, nay—whowill fulfill her potential.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
To think you'd look up to yourself in that way!
What can I say but, "That's Symboli Rudolf for
you!" Next, I'd like to ask about...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi and Tokai Teio—the two of
you have experienced phenomenal growth in
recent years. Is there anyone you look up to?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Who else would I mention aside from the
Prez—Symboli Rudolf?! She's only the coolest
Umamusume out there!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
My drive to be just like Prez is what got me this
far!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
From the moment I enrolled at the academy,
President Rudolf has been a shining example of
the kind of Umamusume I want to be. And that's
why I train as hard as I do!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
I've come as far as I have despite my fragile
health because I had the goal of becoming just
like President Rudolf to work towards!

text_block_list.name: Teio & Tsurumaru
text_block_list.text:
But, you know...
Well, you know...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Hm? Is something the matter?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Noooot really. It's just... How would you put it,
Teio?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh, there's only one way to answer that question!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There seems to be a commotion at the
racecourse. I go to investigate and see that
Symboli Rudolf and some others have started up
a scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Oh wow, I can't believe I get to interview you and watch you race! Today's my lucky day!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: But why a scrimmage?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
"It'd be easier to show than tell," huh. Yeah! I
think that works for us!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Right? What better way to share our feelings than
through racing?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
True. As they say, "Actions speak louder than
words."

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: So, without further ado—

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ngh! I knew Prez wouldn't make this easy! But I
won't give up!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
If I get distracted for even a second, I'll get left in
the dust! But I can do this!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! I can feel their determination from here...
Are they... getting all this power from admiration
alone?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
(The person we look up to... No, it's not just
about that.)

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
(We don't just want to follow in her footsteps. We
want to win—to surpass her. And that's not all...)

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Go, Teio, goooo! You're the strongest racer out
there!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Tsuru! Don't give up! You're the one who'll win it
all in the end!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Well done. But I, too, can still put up a
good fight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoooooa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd goes wild over the spectacular race
unfolding before their eyes. The reporter
watching them seems overwhelmed. Though he
whispers to himself, I can hear him clearly.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Wow... I had it wrong the whole time...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
All three of these racers have an unshakable
belief in their own ability to win.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
It's not that they're looking up to each other as
motivation. I need to change the whole concept
of their feature, starting with the title. I'll call it...
yes... "The Heroic Trio—"
